info.title: KHEOPS API
info.description: KHEOPS is an open-source platform for managing and sharing DICOM medical imaging data. The API provides endpoints for DICOMweb access (QIDO-RS, WADO-RS), album management, user sharing, capability tokens, webhooks, and report providers. Built on OAuth2 and DICOMweb standards.

post.description: Issue viewer tokens or exchange assertions for access tokens.

get.description: Returns studies accessible to the authenticated user. Supports QIDO-RS query parameters plus custom KHEOPS parameters for album and inbox filtering.
Returns WADO-RS metadata for accessible series in a study.

put.description: Mark the specified study as a favorite for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Remove the specified study from the user's favorites.

put.description: Mark the specified series as a favorite.

delete.description: Remove the specified series from favorites.

put.summary: Give a user access to a study
put.description: Share all accessible series of a study with another user.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Target user email or sub claim

put.summary: Give a user access to a series
put.description: Share a specific series with another user.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Target user email or sub claim

put.description: Claim access to a series UID unknown to the authorization server.

delete.description: Relinquish access to a specific series.
Relinquish access to all series in the specified study.

get.description: Returns comments for a specific study.

post.summary: Post a comment about a study
post.description: Add a comment to a specific study.

get.description: Returns all capability tokens for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new capability token for DICOMweb proxy access.

get.description: Returns information about a specific capability token.
Returns all albums accessible to the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new album. The creator becomes the admin.

get.description: Returns metadata for a specific album.

delete.description: Delete an album. Requires admin access.

put.summary: Add a study to an album
put.description: Add all series of a study to an album.

delete.summary: Remove a study from an album
delete.description: Remove a study from an album.

put.summary: Add a series to an album
put.description: Add a specific series to an album.

delete.summary: Remove a series from an album
delete.description: Remove a specific series from an album.

put.summary: Add a user to an album
put.description: Add a user to an album.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Target user email or sub claim

delete.summary: Remove a user from an album
delete.description: Remove a user from an album.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Target user email or sub claim

get.description: List all users in an album.

put.description: Upgrade a user to admin in an album.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Target user email or sub claim

delete.description: Downgrade an admin to regular user in an album.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Target user email or sub claim

post.summary: Post a comment in an album
post.description: Post a comment to an album.

get.description: Get comments and mutations for an album.
List all webhooks for an album.

post.description: Create a new webhook for an album.

get.description: Get details of a specific webhook.

delete.description: Delete a webhook from an album.

get.description: List all report providers for an album.

post.description: Register a new report provider for an album.

get.description: Get details of a specific report provider.

delete.description: Delete a report provider from an album.

get.description: Get the configuration for a report provider.

post.description: Test connectivity to a report provider URI.
Generate a report using a report provider.

get.description: Returns information about the authenticated user.
Returns summary information about the user's inbox.
